name: ALTERNATIVE CAPITAL PARTNERS – ACP
description: Alternative Capital Partners (ACP) is an independent fund management company authorised by the Financial Market Council in Tunisia, dedicated to equity and quasi-equity financing of companies in North Africa, especially Tunisia. Founded in 2006, it manages seed funds, venture capital funds and a growth capital fund for Tunisian SMEs, financing companies across various sectors including industry, services, ICT, distribution and health.

## Structure
| Année de création  | 2006  |
| --- | --- |
| Société  | Alternative Capital Partners  |
| Type de société  | Société de gestion de fonds  |
| Société mère / Groupe  | N/A  |
| Effectif  | 5  |
| Capital social  | 310.000 DT  |
| Total des fonds gérés  | 15.557.700 DT  |
| Nombre d’affaires en portefeuille  | 15  |
| Principaux investissements réalisés  |  IGL Industries, Groupe Vectorys, Delta Impression, LGR, Viamobile, Axe Finance, CytopharmaCYTOPHARMA , SUD POTASSE , PRISMA , ECOMAT , AXE FINANCE .  |
## Politique _d’investissement_
| Champs d’intervention  | Capital Développement, Capital Risque  |
| --- | --- |
| Ticket minimum d’investissement  | 200.000 DT  |
| Ticket maximum d’investissement  | 1.000.000  |
| Durée moyenne d’investissement  | 4 à 7 ans  |
| Secteurs d’activité  | Tous secteurs  |
| Zone géographique d’investissement  |  Tunisie  |

### À propos
L’ATIC fédère et représente les opérateurs Tunisiens du Capital investissement ce qui lui confère une forte légitimité en qualité de porte-parole de la profession auprès des pouvoirs publics.
* [](https://www.facebook.com/Association-Tunisienne-des-Investisseurs-en-Capital-360045507411602/)
* [](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCt0oQoKZdG63Ksac3hUtWtw)
### newsletter

tavily.answer:
Alternative Capital Partners (ACP) is a financial services firm focused on investment banking, advisory, and capital raising. It operates under Swiss Re and supports natural catastrophe risk growth. The official website is https://www.swissre.com/our-business/alternative-capital-partners.html.
Alternative Capital Partners (ACP) is a financial services firm focused on investment banking, advisory, and capital raising. It specializes in structured finance and has offices in New York. Swiss Re's Alternative Capital Partners provides insurance-linked investment strategies.
Alternative Capital Partners (ACP) provides wealth, portfolio, and funds management services, specializing in investment banking, advisory, restructuring, capital raising, and principal investing in project finance, commercial real estate, and renewable energy. ACP also supports Swiss Re's growth in natural catastrophe risks. Founded in 2009, it has 2-10 employees.
Alternative Capital Partners (ACP) is a firm focused on investment banking, advisory, and capital raising, founded in 2009. ACP supports Swiss Re's growth in natural catastrophe reinsurance. The firm emphasizes ESG principles in its investment strategies.
Alternative Capital Partners (ACP) is a division of Swiss Re focused on insurance-linked securities and catastrophe reinsurance. ACP supports Swiss Re's growth in natural catastrophe risks. ACP also manages third-party capital and offers investment strategies.
